SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF COLLYER, MICHAEL SERVED MAY-19-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, DAVID

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON JUN-01-2016 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF MICHAEL COLLYER'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE WITH A DEFERRED PAYMENT THAT IS DUE BY 06/17/16. THE COURT ALSO ORDERED THAT CURRENTLY OWED FEES BY PLAINTIFF MICHAEL COLLYER IS REDUCED IN HALF, WHICH AMOUNTS TO $132.50. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK:DOKAZAKI; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
